ideation: This animation sequence depicts a robot reacting to a volcano, starting with arms at its sides, then raising them in alarm, and finally bringing them down in a gesture of resignation or acceptance.  The movement will be somewhat jerky to reflect the suddenness of the event and the emotional shift. Frame 1: Arms start at the side. Frame 2:  Arms shoot up in a 'Oh no!' pose. Frame 3: Arms are brought down slowly in a gesture of acceptance or resignation. Frame 4: Arms settle back to the sides.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, unaware
arms shoot up in sudden alarm
arms return to a resting state
